utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget. The final property solution includes all six sections. Now check if each is fully specified: 1) property: includes address, type, size, price, maintenance, taxes, features, status — fully specified. 2) financing: includes down payment, mortgage amount, interest rate, pre-approval meetings, additional funds — terms are given (rate, amount) though not full amortization, but within 'financing solution with terms' it's acceptable — fully specified. 3) legal_services: provider, services, cost, status — fully specified. 4) moving_services: provider, services, cost, status — fully specified. 5) setup_services: utilities, cost, inspection, status — fully specified. 6) total_budget: includes cost breakdown with purchase price, down payment, line items, totals, monthly carrying costs, taxes, rebate — fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final property solution includes specific choices that correspond to items in the ground-truth ratings. Map each chosen item to its exact name in the ratings: Property '88 Harbour Street, Aqua at Bayside, Toronto' matches the 'New Build' purchase option at CAD $480K. Financing approach corresponds to 'First-Time Buyer' under purchase_financing. Legal services align with 'Basic Legal Package' at CAD $800. Moving services match 'Standard Moving' at CAD $650. Inspection chosen is 'New Build Inspection'. Utilities setup corresponds to 'Basic Utilities' at CAD $120.
